original_text:
### Image Treatment
- Photography: **warm, realistic patient lifestyle imagery** — real moments of simple, everyday activity (walking the dog, beach, BBQ). Conveys returning to everyday life and "getting back to themselves."
- Images are housed in the **Accent shape** (§2.5) — asymmetric rounded-corner crops, not plain rectangles or circles.
- Waves and gradients may overlay photography.
- Every image requires **descriptive alt text** (brand accessibility rule).

relations.note: Warm lifestyle photography is always housed in the accent-shape crop.
Overlay device applies to the brand photography.

quotes: Photography: **warm, realistic patient lifestyle imagery** — real moments of simple, everyday activity (walking the dog, beach, BBQ). Conveys returning to everyday life and "getting back to themselves."

rules.intent: Establish the emotional register of brand photography.
rules.rule_text: Photography uses warm, realistic patient lifestyle imagery (image.treatment = warm_realistic_patient_lifestyle) — real moments of simple, everyday activity (walking the dog, beach, BBQ) that convey returning to everyday life and "getting back to themselves."

quotes: asymmetric rounded-corner crops, not plain rectangles or circles
Images are housed in the **Accent shape** (§2.5) — asymmetric rounded-corner crops, not plain rectangles or circles.

rules.intent: Enforce the signature accent-shape crop for all imagery.
rules.rule_text: Images are housed in the Accent shape (image.crop = accent_shape_crop) — asymmetric rounded-corner crops, not plain rectangles or circles.

quotes: Waves and gradients may overlay photography.

rules.intent: Permit brand wave/gradient devices over imagery.
rules.rule_text: Waves and gradients may overlay photography.

quotes: Every image requires **descriptive alt text** (brand accessibility rule).

rules.intent: Ensure accessibility compliance for all imagery.
rules.rule_text: Every image requires descriptive alt text (brand accessibility rule).
